steps.title: Write the probability formula and substitute given values
steps.content:
Probability equals the ratio of favorable outcomes to total outcomes. Given that $P(\text{blue}) = 0.35$ and there are 60 total marbles:
$$0.35 = \frac{\text{blue marbles}}{60}$$

steps.title: Solve for the number of blue marbles
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 60:
$$\text{blue marbles} = 0.35 \times 60 = 21$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
